positive: A detailed watercolor illustration of a glowing mushroom forest. Include bioluminescent flora, delicate ferns, and mossy textures. The style should be ethereal and soft, with deep jewel tones and gentle light sources. Digital painting, storybook quality, high detail.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, photo-realistic, monochrome
